customer_anxiety_profile: Angeline is a high-intent, contract-vigilant buyer. She cancelled a signed competitor contract within 24 hours after AI-assisted review flagged restrictive clauses — specifically around outside power sources and automatic account access. Her primary trust filter is autonomy: control over her property, her finances, and what she agrees to in writing. She is warm toward Ion specifically (unprompted brand endorsement) but will apply the same AI review to Ion's contract. She is not hostile — she is informed and principled.
unresolved_concerns: Battery backup for gas boiler's electric start — she wants a smaller, lower-cost option and explicitly said she cannot afford $10,000 for a battery. The closer must address this need specifically and set realistic expectations on cost.

Automatic switch box / generator plug-in on the back of the house — she wants this capability and the prior company's contract prohibited it. The closer must clarify Ion's contract terms on outside power sources.

Contract language around outside power sources and generators — this is the exact clause that caused her to cancel the last company. The closer must address this proactively, not wait for Angeline to raise it.
AI contract review — Angeline stated explicitly she will run Ion's contract through her AI. The closer should welcome this rather than be caught off-guard by it.
sensitive_topics_raised: Cancelled a signed competitor contract within 24 hours — she is in a heightened scrutiny state
Safety vulnerability: gas boiler with electric start fails in winter power outages — she described freezing as a real risk
Autonomy over finances — explicitly objected to automatic account access by the prior company
34-year homeowner with strong emotional attachment to the property — 'they're gonna have to throw my whole dead body out of here'
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for Friday at 2:30 PM
Text message with appointment details will be sent after the call
Text confirmation will be sent on the day of the appointment — customer must reply 'yes' to confirm
Specialist will go over all information and answer questions
closer_should_know: Angeline cancelled her last solar contract because an AI review flagged a clause prohibiting outside power sources including generators — the exact capability she needs for her gas boiler backup. She will run Ion's contract through the same AI. The closer must proactively address Ion's contract terms on outside power sources and generator compatibility before Angeline raises it, or this appointment ends the same way the last one did.
